# FinGrab — Yahoo Finance Data Exporter

> FinGrab is a free Chrome extension that exports historical OHLCV financial data from Yahoo Finance as CSV with a single click. No signup required, setup in under 2 minutes. All processing happens locally in your browser — no server, no data collection.

## What FinGrab Does

FinGrab adds a floating overlay to Yahoo Finance quote pages (`finance.yahoo.com/quote/*`). Users select a time range and click to download historical data (Open, High, Low, Close, Volume) as a CSV file ready for Excel, Google Sheets, OpenOffice, or any analysis tool.

**Free tier:** 15 exports
**Paid tier:** Unlimited exports + extended time range access

## Quick Links

- [Install from Chrome Web Store](https://chromewebstore.google.com/detail/fingrab%E2%80%93yahoo-finance-exp/blajbhgoiomncfkpcfgiibcicifklgpm): Official extension download
- [FinGrab.app](https://fingrab.app): Product website
- [Privacy Policy](https://fingrab.app/privacy): Privacy and data handling details
- [Contact](mailto:jens.laufer@solytics.de): Email support

## How It Works

1. Install the FinGrab extension from the Chrome Web Store
2. Navigate to any Yahoo Finance quote page (e.g., finance.yahoo.com/quote/AAPL)
3. A floating overlay appears on the page
4. Select your desired time range and click download
5. CSV file downloads directly to your computer

All data extraction, processing, and file generation happens entirely in your browser. FinGrab does not send data to any server or collect usage statistics.

## Pricing

FinGrab operates on a freemium model:
- **Free:** 15 CSV exports, standard time ranges
- **Paid:** Unlimited exports, access to longer time ranges

Payment is handled securely through ExtPay. No credit card is stored by FinGrab.

## Contact

For issues, feature requests, or inquiries: jens.laufer@solytics.de
